session.user:
Run the following CI checks and report all results: 1. `ruff check src/ tests/` (linting) 2. `ruff format --check src/ tests/` (formatting) 3. `ty check src/` (type checking) 4. `pytest tests/ -x -q --timeout=30` (unit tests, quick mode)
Report all results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report.
session.assistant: I'll run all four CI checks and report the results. Let me execute them in parallel.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/ tests/

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff format --check src/ tests/

Exit code 1 ........................................................................ [ 1%] ........................................................................ [ 2%] ..F =================================== FAILURES =================================== ___________________ test_get_bundled_codex_dir_wheel_install ___________________
def test_get_bundled_codex_dir_wheel_install() -> None: """Returns erk/data/codex/ for wheel installs.""" _get_erk_package_dir.cache_clear() get_bundled_codex_dir.cache_clear() with patch( "erk.artifacts.paths._get_erk_package_dir", return_value=Path("/home/user/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/erk"), ): result = get_bundled_codex_dir() > assert result == Path("/home/user/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/erk/data/codex") E AssertionError: assert PosixPath('/home/user/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/erk/data/claude') == PosixPath('/home/user/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/erk/data/codex') E + where PosixPath('/home/user/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/erk/data/codex') = Path('/home/user/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/erk/data/codex')
tests/artifacts/test_sync.py:223: AssertionError =========================== short test summary info ============================ FAILED tests/artifacts/test_sync.py::test_get_bundled_codex_dir_wheel_install - AssertionError: assert PosixPath('/home/user/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/erk/data/claude') == PosixPath('/home/user/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/erk/data/codex') + where PosixPath('/home/user/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/erk/data/codex') = Path('/home/user/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/erk/data/codex') !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! stopping after 1 failures !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
session.assistant:
## CI Check Results
**ruff check (linting):** PASSED - All checks passed
**ruff format (formatting):** PASSED - 1144 files already formatted (no changes needed)
**ty check (type checking):** PASSED - All checks passed
**pytest (unit tests):** FAILED - 1 test failure found
### Test Failure Details
**File:** `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/artifacts/test_sync.py`
**Test:** `test_get_bundled_codex_dir_wheel_install` (line 223)
**Error:** AssertionError - path mismatch - Expected: `/home/user/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/erk/data/codex` - Actual: `/home/user/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/erk/data/claude`
The test expects the bundled directory to be `erk/data/codex` but the function is returning `erk/data/claude`. This appears to be a recent change where the data directory was renamed from `codex` to `claude`.
